benefits.description: Seeing huge benefits with KLOW (self-reported, specific benefits not detailed beyond comparison to mother's experience)

side_effects.description: Injection can sting due to low pH of GHK-Cu; can be mitigated by warming syringe to room temp and injecting slowly

protocol_notes: Tried Wolverine blend for one month, then switched to KLOW for almost a month. Strongly prefers KLOW over Wolverine blend. Also reports on 56-year-old mother's experience with KLOW: knee pain and neck/shoulder pain mostly resolved, energy levels feeling like her 30s after one month.
